name: Juky San
description:
'''Trần Thị Dung''', known professionally as '''Juky San''' (born 14 January 1998), is a [[Vietnamese language|Vietnamese]] [[singer-songwriter]].

She participated in season 6 of [[Giọng hát Việt|The Voice Vietnam]] (2019). Belonged to Huynh Hoai Anh's team. Stopped in the final Top 7. Before participating in TV shows, Juky San was known for her covers of songs such as "Cau hon", "Yeu em dai kho", and "Em ngay nay". After the cover, she started releasing official songs. San also participated in [[The Masked Singer Vietnam (season 1)|season 1]] of ''[[The Masked Singer Vietnam]]'' with her character as Chip Chip Pink. In 2025, Juky San joined the TV show ''[[Em xinh "say hi"]]''.
